overall_assessment.summary: PHASE 35 AGGRESSIVE RECOVERY EXECUTED. The freeze is lifted, 12 targeted fixes deployed, all verified live. Root cause identified: zero-click architecture where tool variants outrank parents and give answers in SERP snippets. Phase 35 addresses this via noindexing cannibal variants, strengthening parent titles, restructuring the #1 blog, and submitting GSC removals + recrawl requests. Today's GSC data (Jun 17-23) predates all fixes — zero measurable effect yet. The real test begins Jul 2-9 when Google recrawls. Until then: OFF_TRACK but with a deployed fix plan.
overall_assessment.critical_path: Google recrawl → parent calculator impression lift → 20k blog CTR > 0% → first non-tool-variant content click → early validation that architecture repair works → expand to remaining calculators if confirmed.
